summary: "BACK" button navigates user to the top of the page - GAMES PAGE
description:
Given user is navigating the MLB app 

And user is on the GAMES page

When the user select the “Back” button on their remote control

Then the user is redirected to the top of the page - w/ focus on the Games nav button

steps.action: WHEN the user select the "Back" button on their remote control
steps.result: THEN the user is redirected to the top of the page - w/ focus on the Games nav button
